name: tuxtests
description: Linux hardware diagnostics with CLI, Ratatui, and Tauri surfaces

scripts.tauri:check: cargo build --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings
scripts.check: cargo fmt --check && cargo test && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo build --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings
